# Zacatl

> Universal TypeScript framework for building CLI tools, desktop apps, APIs, and
> distributed systems with layered architecture, dependency injection, and
> pluggable ORM adapters.

- [README](../README.md)
- [Changelog](changelog.md)
- [Framework Overview](guidelines/framework-overview.md)
- [Code Style](guidelines/code-style.md)

## Architecture

Zacatl enforces four layers:

```
Application  — use-cases, handlers, commands
Domain       — ports, contracts, domain services
Infrastructure — repository implementations (Mongoose / Sequelize / SQLite)
Platforms    — server (Fastify / Express), CLI, Desktop
```

Full architecture docs: [guidelines/architecture.md](guidelines/architecture.md)

## Install

```bash
npm install @sentzunhat/zacatl
```

All supported ORMs and platforms (`mongoose`, `sequelize`, `express`, `fastify`,
`better-sqlite3`) are **bundled as dependencies** — no extra installs required.
Only SQL dialect drivers (e.g. `pg`, `mysql2`) need a separate install.

## Core imports

```typescript
// Framework core
import { Service, ServiceType } from "@sentzunhat/zacatl";

// Dependency injection
import { singleton, inject, resolveDependency } from "@sentzunhat/zacatl";

// Structured errors
import { NotFoundError, InternalServerError } from "@sentzunhat/zacatl";

// ORM — subpath imports only (keeps main entry lean)
import { mongoose, Schema } from "@sentzunhat/zacatl/third-party/mongoose";
import { Sequelize, DataTypes } from "@sentzunhat/zacatl/third-party/sequelize";
```

## Key modules

- [Service / Server setup](service/README.md)
- [Dependency Injection](dependency-injection/README.md)
- [Repositories / ORM adapters](service/repository.md)
- [Error types](error/README.md)

- [Configuration (YAML/JSON)](configuration/README.md)
- [Localization](localization/README.md)
- [Third-party re-exports](third-party/README.md)
- [Dependencies reference](third-party/dependencies-reference.md)

## Working examples

Ready-to-run examples live in [`examples/`](../examples/):

| Example | Stack |
|---|---|
| [platform-fastify/with-sqlite](../examples/platform-fastify/with-sqlite/) | Fastify + SQLite |
| [platform-fastify/with-mongodb](../examples/platform-fastify/with-mongodb/) | Fastify + MongoDB |
| [platform-fastify/with-postgres-react](../examples/platform-fastify/with-postgres-react/) | Fastify + PostgreSQL + React |
| [platform-fastify/with-sqlite-react](../examples/platform-fastify/with-sqlite-react/) | Fastify + SQLite + React |
| [platform-express/with-mongodb-react](../examples/platform-express/with-mongodb-react/) | Express + MongoDB + React |
| [platform-express/with-postgres-react](../examples/platform-express/with-postgres-react/) | Express + PostgreSQL + React |

## ORM subpath pattern

ORM and platform code is lazy-loaded via subpaths — the main entry never
evaluates ORM or framework code unless explicitly imported:

```typescript
// ✅ Only loads Mongoose at runtime
import { mongoose } from "@sentzunhat/zacatl/third-party/mongoose";

// ✅ Only loads Sequelize at runtime
import { Sequelize } from "@sentzunhat/zacatl/third-party/sequelize";
```

## Source layout

```
src/
  index.ts               — main barrel (core only, no ORM)
  configuration/         — YAML/JSON config loading
  dependency-injection/  — tsyringe DI helpers
  error/                 — structured error types
  localization/          — i18n adapters
  logs/                  — pino logger adapter
  service/
    layers/              — application / domain / infrastructure
    platforms/           — server (Fastify + Express), CLI, desktop
  third-party/           — thin re-export wrappers (mongoose, sequelize, etc.)
  utils/                 — command runner, optionals, path aliases
```
